title: hypericum × desetangsii nothosubsp. carinthiacum
intro: Hypericum × desetangsii nothosubsp. carinthiacum, also known as St. John's wort, is a type of flowering plant in the Hypericum genus that is commonly found in mountainous regions. This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat mild to moderate depression and anxiety due to its high concentration of hypericin and hyperforin. The health benefits of St. John's wort include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor burns. St. John's wort is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, and is also available in capsule or tablet form.
